name: Shrimp Sauce- Pasta and Co. by Request
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Rock shrimp or small Prawns Shelled & uncooked
1/2 tsp Dried rosemary OR 2t fresh rosemary
1/2 tsp Dried oregano OR 4 t fresh oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor bowl equipped with steel blade, puree to a paste the olive oil, lemon juice, rosemary, oregano, paprika, salt, cayenne, and garlic.
2. Stop the motor a couple of times, and scrape down the sides of the work bowl with a spatula to make sure garlic is getting finely minced.
3. In a large saute pan, melt butter.
4. Add olive oil mixture and bay leaves to the pan.
5. Saute briefly over medium heat. Do not burn garlic.
6. Add shrimp to the pan. Roll shrimp around in pan so each shrimp is coated with the hot sauce and cooks quickly.
7. As soon as shrimp are barely cooked (be careful not to overcook - it may take only 1 to 2 minutes), remove pan from heat.
8. When pasta is cooked and well-drained, return saute pan to low heat, add pasta, and toss with the shrimp sauce to coat.
9. Fold in spinach and tomatoes.
10. Serve immediately, topped with Parmesan.
